mnemonics: CTRL-ALT-DELETE For Clouds: Cloud Types, Advantages, Limitations, Deployment models, Examples, Threats, and Security (CTRL ALT DEL E T S)
keyPoints: Cloud computing delivers computing services over the internet (the cloud) on a pay-as-you-go basis.
The three main service models are Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS), and Software as a Service (SaaS).
The four main deployment models are Public Cloud, Private Cloud, Hybrid Cloud, and Community Cloud.
commonMistakes: Confusing SaaS (e.g., Gmail) with PaaS (e.g., Google App Engine) or IaaS (e.g., AWS EC2).
Assuming 'cloud' is inherently insecure; security is a shared responsibility model between the provider and the consumer.
